summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because this is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter, instant/low-signal closeout is disabled, and many later refs lack hydrated live state due GitHub rate limiting.
